mapper.select: SELECT username, real_name as realName, staff_id as staffId, department, position, phone, email, role, role_level as roleLevel, avatar, last_login as lastLogin FROM sys_user WHERE username=#{username} AND password=#{password}

SELECT username, real_name as realName, staff_id as staffId, department, position, phone, email, role, role_level as roleLevel, avatar, last_login as lastLogin FROM sys_user WHERE username=#{username}
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user SET real_name=#{realName}, phone=#{phone}, email=#{email}, department=#{department}, position=#{position} WHERE username=#{username}
UPDATE sys_user SET password=#{newPassword} WHERE username=#{username} AND password=#{oldPassword}
mapper.select: SELECT username, real_name as realName, staff_id as staffId, department, position, phone, email, role, role_level as roleLevel FROM sys_user WHERE 1=1 AND (username LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR real_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%')) ORDER BY role_level, create_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user (username, password, real_name, staff_id, department, position, phone, email, role, role_level) VALUES (#{username},#{password},#{realName},#{staffId},#{department},#{position},#{phone},#{email},'AUDITOR',#{roleLevel})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user SET real_name=#{realName}, staff_id=#{staffId}, department=#{department}, position=#{position}, phone=#{phone}, email=#{email}, role_level=#{roleLevel} WHERE username=#{username}
UPDATE sys_user SET password=#{password} WHERE username=#{username}
